---
title: "feature_sensitivity"
output: html_document
---


```{r}
library(data.table)
library(ggplot2)
```


```{r}
make_feat_df <- function(file, farm_label) {
  df <- fread(file)
  names(df) <- make.unique(names(df))
  df[, noise_model := tolower(as.character(noise_model))]
  df <- df[noise_model == "gaussian"]

  df <- df[, .(feature, sensitivity)]
  df <- df[, .(sensitivity = mean(sensitivity, na.rm = TRUE)), by = feature]
  df[, norm_sensitivity := sensitivity / max(sensitivity, na.rm = TRUE)]
  df[, farm := farm_label]

  df
}

df_A <- make_feat_df("WindFarmA_combined_feature_sensitivity.csv", "Wind Farm A")
df_B <- make_feat_df("WindFarmB_combined_feature_sensitivity.csv", "Wind Farm B")
df_C <- make_feat_df("WindFarmC_combined_feature_sensitivity.csv", "Wind Farm C")

all_df <- rbindlist(list(df_A, df_B, df_C), fill = TRUE)

top_features <- all_df[
  , .(best_sensitivity = max(norm_sensitivity, na.rm = TRUE)),
  by = feature
][order(-best_sensitivity)]$feature[1:15]

plot_df <- all_df[feature %in% top_features]

feature_order <- plot_df[
  , .(best_sensitivity = max(norm_sensitivity, na.rm = TRUE)),
  by = feature
][order(best_sensitivity)]$feature

plot_df[, feature := factor(feature, levels = feature_order)]

farm_colors <- c(
  "Wind Farm A" = "#9ecae1",
  "Wind Farm B" = "#b2abd2",
  "Wind Farm C" = "#e6b899"
)

ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = norm_sensitivity, y = feature, color = farm)) +
  geom_segment(aes(x = 0, xend = norm_sensitivity, yend = feature), linewidth = 1.2, alpha = 0.6) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  scale_color_manual(values = farm_colors) +
  labs(
    title = "Top Feature Sensitivities Across Wind Farms",
    x = "Normalized Sensitivity",
    y = "Feature",
    color = NULL
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "right"
  )
```
